NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

THIS NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (the "Agreement") is entered into as of this 5th day of October, 2023, by and between Mr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238456, and Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC No. S3456789C, of ABC Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 202312345Z, located at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048616.

1. Definition of Confidential Information. For purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall include all data, materials, and information, whether written or oral, disclosed by either party to the other, including but not limited to financial data, trade secrets, project status updates, and technical specifications. Confidential Information shall not include information that is publicly known or becomes known through no breach of this Agreement.

2. Non-Disclosure Obligations. Each party agrees to retain in confidence and not disclose any Confidential Information to any third parties without prior written consent from the disclosing party. The receiving party shall use the same degree of care to protect the Confidential Information as it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no event less than reasonable care. No project plan or technical specification disclosed pursuant to this Agreement shall be deemed to be public domain.

Contact for Notices:
Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah
Email: sitiaishah@abcinno.sg
Phone: +65 6123 4567

For further details, access the secure document at https://secure.sg/doc/S2345678B.
